data.title: Cascade River Road — Seasonal Closure
data.description: Cascade River Road is closed at milepost 0.5 due to seasonal conditions. No vehicle access to Cascade Pass trailhead. Expect closure through late May depending on snowpack.

data.title: Newhalem Creek Campground — Limited Services
data.description: Water systems are not yet operational for the season. Vault toilets available. No potable water on site.

data.title: Thunder Creek Trail — Hazard Trees
data.description: Multiple downed trees across Thunder Creek Trail between miles 2-4. Trail passable with caution. Crews scheduled for clearing in early April.
